name: dixie-flatline
description: Persistent project memory for AI coding agents.

commands.title: Dixie Flatline: Update Memory from Diff

chatParticipants.name: project-memory
chatParticipants.description: Answers questions using structured, time-aware project memory.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the active file using structured project memory.

commands.name: decisions
commands.description: Find behavior-guiding decisions that affect the active file or prompt.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Suggest memory updates from current changes.

disambiguation.description: Questions about repository decisions, architecture, conventions, domain model, testing practices, or known issues stored in .llm-wiki memory.
examples: Explain this file using project memory
Summarise the auth flow from memory

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_searchProjectMemory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches the repository-local .llm-wiki structured Markdown memory for typed decisions, facts, assumptions, known issues, and questions. Use when Copilot needs durable context about this codebase.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getRelevantMemory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns critical and high-importance typed memory entries relevant to a file path, ranked by file relevance, importance, confidence, and freshness.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get behavior-guiding memory for a file.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getRelevantContext
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns memory entries relevant to an absolute or workspace-relative file path using relatedFiles, tags, importance, confidence, freshness, filename matching, and text scoring.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get memory context for a file.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getRelevantDecisions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns decision entries from project memory that are relevant to a file path, including behavioral constraints and anti-patterns.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get relevant memory decisions for a file.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getCriticalDecisions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns critical and high-importance decision entries that should actively constrain Copilot behavior.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_recordDecision
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Records a structured architectural or behavioral decision into .llm-wiki/memory/ as a typed decision entry with importance, confidence, constraints, anti-patterns, and source metadata. Use only when the user asks to persist a decision.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Record a decision in project memory.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_updateMemoryFromDiff
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Analyzes a git diff and returns suggested typed memory updates such as new decision, update decision, supersede decision, known issue, or question. The MVP uses deterministic heuristics and does not automatically write.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Suggest project memory updates from a diff.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_findConflicts
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Finds competing, superseded, proposed, or ambiguous memory entries for a topic. Use when Copilot needs to see unresolved or historical ambiguity rather than flattening it.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find conflicts or ambiguity in memory.

topic.description: Topic to inspect for conflicting claims or decisions.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getOpenQuestions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns open question entries from project memory so unknowns are visible to Copilot and agents.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_generateCopilotInstructions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Builds .github/copilot-instructions.md content from project memory, emphasizing critical/high-importance decisions, constraints, anti-patterns, known issues, confidence, and freshness.

projectMemory.maxSearchResults.description: Maximum number of memory entries returned in chat and tools.

projectMemory.freshnessThresholdDays.description: Age in days after which verified memory is treated as stale and deprioritized.
